name: @odh-dashboard/autox-core
description: AutoX shared library package - provides shared BFF and Frontend utilities for AutoML, AutoRAG, and related packages.

scripts.type-check: (cd ui && npm run test:type-check) && (cd services && go build ./...)
scripts.lint: (cd ui && npm run test:lint) && (cd services && make lint)
scripts.test-unit: (cd ui && npm run test:unit) && (cd services && make test)
